### Is there an existing issue for this?

config env

VSCODE_PROXY_URI: https://{{port}}-code.domain.ltd
open https://{{port}}-code.domain.ltd
### Expected
The request should be redirected to the local proxy port {{port}}.
### Actual
The request redirects to coder-server instead of the local proxy port.

  "overall_quality": "needs_revision",
  "rewrite": "Please support header rows in RestructuredText output. It would be great if the following would work:

```Python
>>> from astropy.table import QTable
>>> import astropy.units as u
>>> import sys
>>> tbl = QTable({'wave': [350,950]*u.nm, 'response': [0.7, 1.2]*u.count})
>>> tbl.write(sys.stdout, format="ascii.rst")
===== ========
 wave response
===== ========
350.0      0.7
950.0      1.2
===== ========
>>> tbl.write(sys.stdout, format="ascii.fixed_width", header_rows=["name", "unit"])
|  wave | response |
|    nm |       ct |
| 350.0 |      0.7 |
| 950.0 |      1.2 |
>>> tbl.write(sys.stdout, format="ascii.rst", header_rows=["name", "unit"])
===== ========
 name unit
===== ========
 wave response
===== ========
    nm       ct
===== ========
350.0      0.7
950.0      1.2
===== ========
```",
  "needs_human_review": false
}
